caption: uicwritingcenter April 18, 2024: "We are here for you during finals! Stop by the Writing Center for a tutoring session, a cozy place to study, a snack, and lots of moral support! From all of us at the Writing Center, good luck! 🪴🌷".
caption_raw: uicwritingcenter April 18, 2024: "We are here for you during finals! Stop by the Writing Center for a tutoring session, a cozy place to study, a snack, and lots of moral support! From all of us at the Writing Center, good luck! 🪴🌷".

caption: uicwritingcenter March 28, 2024: "While you're planning your schedule for next semester, consider taking our tutor training courses, ENGL 282 and ENGL 482! 📝 Tutors spend one semester training and attending seminar and are then eligible to apply to be paid staff or volunteer tutors! No prior tutoring experience is required. 🤓 This is a great way to expand your own writing skills while also helping your peers in an anti-oppressive environment. DM us or stop by the WC with any questions you may have! 🪴☕️".

caption:
"We’ve been busy this summer at the Writing Center!  First off, we got the chance to try some serviceberries from the trees outside! 

Next, we created pamphlets from career center resources and resume/cover letter tips. We have several different handouts scattered across the Center’s physical space!

We will be closed next Monday (June 19) for Juneteenth and we reopen on Tuesday. Check online for availability! Now is a great time to work on professional development (resumes, cover letters) and creative writing!".

caption:
"Thank you all for your patience. With the culmination of the strike, the UIC Writing Center will be reinstating in-person appointments. If you’re scheduled for an in-person appointment and you’d like to be online, don’t worry! Just reach out to our front desk at 312-413-2206 and they can update the modality for you. 

We look forward to seeing you all!".
caption_raw:
14 likes, 0 comments - uicwritingcenter January 23, 2023: "Thank you all for your patience. With the culmination of the strike, the UIC Writing Center will be reinstating in-person appointments. If you’re scheduled for an in-person appointment and you’d like to be online, don’t worry! Just reach out to our front desk at 312-413-2206 and they can update the modality for you. 

We look forward to seeing you all!".

caption: "The UIC Writing Center Instagram team acknowledges and supports the UIC United Faculty (Local 6456) in their decision to go on strike. All Writing Center appointments will be online. The physical space will be open to any and all students, but tutors will conduct sessions through online synchronous or email appointments only. Check back to our Instagram page for updates.".
